Proximal macrophages, rep_1: For the coculture of HER2+ MDA cells and MŒ¶, THP-1 cells were passaged at the final concentration of 2 √ó 106 cells / mL and stimulated with 250 nM PMA. After 48 h of stimulation, the obtained MŒ¶ were washed with PBS for 3 times. HER2+ MDA cells were dissociated and resuspended in RPMI1640 medium at the final concentration of 5 √ó 104 cells / mL. The resulting HER2+ MDA cells were added to the MŒ¶ culture with a ratio of 1:40. After 24 h of coculture, the cells were subjected to QMID. Cell cocultures were incubated with 2 Œºg/mL ZHER-Œ≤Gal in the culture medium at 37¬∞C. After 30 min of incubation, the cells were washed with PBS for 3 times. Next, the cells were incubated with gFQM-biotin or gFMeQM-biotin at indicated concentrations for 10 min. The cells were washed once with PBS and dissociated with trypsin. The resulting cell suspension was stained with streptavidin-AF647 for 30 min in PBS. After 3 more washes with PBS, the cells were subjected to FACS.

Proximal macrophages, rep_1: Total RNA was used as input material for the RNA sample preparations. Briefly, mRNA was purified from total RNA using poly-T oligo-attached magnetic beads. Fragmentation was carried out using divalent cations under elevated temperature in First Strand Synthesis Reaction Buffer (5X). First-strand cDNA was synthesized using random hexamer primer and M-MuLV Reverse Transcriptase (RNase H-). Second strand cDNA synthesis was subsequently performed using DNA Polymerase I and RNase H. Remaining overhangs were converted into blunt ends via exonuclease/polymerase activities. After adenylation of 3‚Äô ends of DNA fragments, Adaptor with hairpin loop structure was ligated to prepare for hybridization. In order to select cDNA fragments of preferentially 370~420 bp in length, the library fragments were purified with the AMPure XP system (Beckman Coulter, Beverly, USA). Then PCR was performed with Phusion High-Fidelity DNA polymerase, Universal PCR primers, and Index (X) Primer. At last, PCR products were purified (AMPure XP system) and library quality was assessed on the Agilent Bioanalyzer 2100 system. The clustering of the index-coded samples was performed on a cBot Cluster Generation System using TruSeq PE Cluster Kit v3-cBot-HS (Illumia) according to the manufacturer‚Äôs instructions. After cluster generation, the library was sequenced on an Illumina Novaseq platform and 150 bp paired-end reads were generated.

Proximal macrophages, rep_1: Differential gene expression was performed using DESeq2 v1.34.0. Genes with a p-value greater than 0.05 for the comparison between proximal or distal cells and monocultured cells were removed from subsequent analysis. PCA was performed with the FactoMineR package v2.4. K-means was conducted using the kmeans() function in base R. PCA of different samples and genes were performed by using the scaled log2RPM values and the scaled FPKM values as the input, respectively. GSEA was performed by the clusterProfiler v4.2.2.
